global.description: The ad features a modern product display with a clear promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a discount on bestsellers with a call to action.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A vibrant orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Mirror product display
elements.description: A sleek, modern display of two vertical mirrors with a reflective surface, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Three simple, circular icons arranged horizontally beneath the mirror display.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The bold, uppercase text 'LuxShelf' in a modern font, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Discount offer text
elements.description: Text stating 'Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now' in a clear, readable font, centered below the logo.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' displayed in a bold font at the bottom, indicating affordability.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Element
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the product display, body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now, €9.99, Try for free
